elements.original_description: A white desk with three unopened envelopes lying flat, one white, one yellow, and one blue, arranged diagonally from bottom left to upper right. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a clean white desk surface, featuring three unopened envelopes lying flat, one white, one yellow, and one blue, arranged diagonally from bottom left to upper right. Cinematic studio lighting with soft shadows, sharp focus, and a minimalist, quiet mood. Absolutely no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks visible, pure and professional composition.
